---
title: "Schedule"
---

The JHU Data Analytics and Policy Hackathon will be held at the Hopkins Bloomberg Center at 555 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington, DC 20001.

**Friday, April 10**

11:00 am -- noon: Check in

Noon: Lunch, opening comments, and organization

1:00--3:00 pm: Work Session 1

3:00--3:30 pm: Snacks and status updates

3:30--6:00 pm: Work Session 2

6:00--7:00 pm: Dinner and featured speaker Robin Ghertner

7:00 pm and onwards: Continue your work as needed and get some rest.

**Saturday, April 11**

9:00 am: Light snacks and coffee, opening announcement

9:30 am -- noon: Work Session 3

Noon--1:30 pm: Lunch and featured speaker Lula Chen

1:30--3:00 pm: Final preparations

3:00--5:00 pm: Presentations and closing
